intake.user_request: Re-stamp the 174 source files on feature/source-headers-dogfood with the fixed @coderef-semantic: 1.0.0 format. Strip old @semantic blocks first, re-run --source-headers, then rebuild graph.json + rag-index and verify > 0 chunks indexed.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Targeted branch operation: strip old @semantic blocks, re-stamp with correct @coderef-semantic: 1.0.0 format, repopulate graph, reindex. No broad discovery needed — root cause and files already identified in WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-E2E-VALIDATION-001.

in_scope: Strip @semantic blocks stamped by populate-coderef --source-headers from all source files on feature/source-headers-dogfood

Re-run rag-index to rebuild vectors with header-gated chunks now passing
Verify > 0 chunks indexed (headerStatus: present on file-grain nodes)

Running live discovery RAG query (blocked by OpenAI key)
Modifying semantic-header-parser.ts (Resolution Option B — not selected)
Decoupling @semantic from headerStatus signal (Resolution Option C — not selected)

constraints: Work on feature/source-headers-dogfood only — do NOT merge to main
